untranslatable_reason: Signal requires put/call ratio (P/(P+C)) calculated from option volume data, which is NOT in the allowed indicators list. The backtest engine only supports equity price/volume indicators (OHLCV, moving averages, RSI, ATR, Bollinger Bands, MACD, ADX, Stochastic, Donchian, Pivots, volume ratios, and z-scores). Options data (put volume, call volume) is not available. Additionally, the signal requires firm size filtering ('predictive_strength decreases with firm size'), which also requires external fundamental data not in the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: Source paper studies put/call ratio as a predictor of stock returns across 2, 5, and 8-day holding periods, with stronger effects for smaller firms. The effect is also moderated by relative option-to-stock volume activity. Without access to options volume data and firm size classification, this signal cannot be translated into the current backtest engine's capabilities.
